summary: Completed testing of Packaging Materials System (Phases 2-4): Branch packaging request interface, warehouse keeper approval/transfer, and branch packaging inventory display. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified all tabs and features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: PackagingRequestCreate model (inventory_system.py lines 245-249) correctly includes from_branch_id field
Code review passed: POST /api/packaging-requests endpoint (lines 2537-2594) correctly handles from_branch_id and creates notifications
Code review passed: POST /api/packaging-requests/{id}/approve endpoint (lines 2596-2622) correctly updates status to approved
Code review passed: POST /api/packaging-requests/{id}/transfer endpoint (lines 2624-2702) correctly deducts from main warehouse and adds to branch inventory
Code review passed: GET /api/branch-packaging-inventory endpoint (lines 2731-2758) correctly returns branch inventory with calculated remaining quantities
Code review passed: Frontend 'طلب تغليف' tab (WarehouseManufacturing.js lines 1549-1780) displays materials grid, cart, and request history
Code review passed: Frontend 'مخزون الفرع' tab (WarehouseManufacturing.js lines 1782-1909) displays branch inventory with statistics cards
seed_data_creation: Created test branches and packaging materials with TEST_ prefix during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packaging Materials System (Phases 2-4) verified: 1) Branch users can request packaging materials via 'طلب تغليف' tab with material selection grid and cart. 2) Warehouse keeper can approve and transfer requests via 'الورقيات' tab. 3) Branch inventory displayed in 'مخزون الفرع' tab with statistics (total items, total value, low stock items, used quantity). 4) Transfer correctly deducts from main warehouse and adds to branch inventory. All APIs working: POST /api/packaging-requests (with from_branch_id), POST /api/packaging-requests/{id}/approve, POST /api/packaging-requests/{id}/transfer, GET /api/branch-packaging-inventory.

tests_performed.details: Created test branches for packaging requests
Created packaging request with from_branch_id correctly set
Transferred materials to branch, deducted from main warehouse
Returns filtered branch inventory with transferred materials
Complete flow: Create branch -> Create material -> Create request -> Transfer -> Verify warehouse deduction -> Verify branch inventory increase
Found tab with materials grid (7 materials), 'سجل الطلبات' button, and 'طلباتي الأخيرة' section
Found tab with branch inventory header, 13 inventory items, and 6 statistics cards
Found admin packaging management tab with materials list showing received, transferred, and remaining quantities
